specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-4000 series / AMD FX-6300 or equivalent (2.4 GHz dual-core or newer)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 11 / OpenGL 4.1 compatible GPU with WebGL 2.0 support (Intel HD Graphics 4000 or better, 1 GB VRAM)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 5 GB available space

specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-8400 / AMD Ryzen 5 2600 or better (3.0 GHz quad-core)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Dedicated GPU with 2 GB VRAM (NVIDIA GTX 1050 / AMD RX 560 / Intel Iris Xe or better)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: SSD recommended for faster map transitions. Dedicated GPU strongly recommended for stable 60 FPS with all effects enabled.
